Scherer Family Spice Cake

Beth Germick

Prep time -

Cook time -

Yield:

Ingredients

2 cups sugar 1 cup butter 3 eggs 1 cup water 3 cups flour 2 tsp baking powder 1 cup chopped walnuts 1/2 tsp cinnamon, nutmeg, and cloves

Directions

Bake at 350 in two medium sized pans.
